case_title: DRAGUNSKAYA, LARISA VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CONTROLLER'S OFF. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CONTROLLER'S OFF.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS CONTROLLER'S OFFICE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DRAGUNSKAYA, LARISA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CONTROLLER'S OFF. DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS CONTROLLER'S OFFICE A. RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAGUNSKAYA, LARISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CONTROLLER'S OFF. DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS CONTROLLER'S OFFICE A. RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES, INC. $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,505.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3000, AND ATTRIBUTES 20% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
